channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipping, 25th April
item.description:
Waste bin and broken clothes surer dumped by gate to tennis courts on altash way. Residents are concerned that this area will become a dumping ground now that there is increased footfall with the better weather.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Altash Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose Manhole Cover., 25th April
item.description:
Really noisy loose manhole cover clanging every time a vehicle drives over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Sloane Street, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bag of slate tiles dumped outside 1 Villacourt Road, 25th April
item.description:
Fly tip frequent tipping spot known suspect but can't prove it!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged car getting worse, 25th April
item.description:
This car has been a eyesore for months and months and nothing gets done about it. bits of metal are breaking off and are in the road, Whoever left it there does not seem bothered so please could someone remove it. Already seen one car get a metal shard in tyre because of the broken metal.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Haven Close, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped, 25th April
item.description:
This property keeps dumping their rubbish outside their side gate. This is the third time the council have been asked to remove rubbish from this location. It spreads all over the road and attracts vermin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cupboards dumped, 25th April
item.description:
Despite the signage, items continue to be dumped here regularly. This makes the area look very untidy and unpleasant for local residents. I would appreciate it if you could consider what additional measures could be put in place to prevent this from happen

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cromford Path, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Matresses and bags left on Caleb St SE1 1EW, 25th April
item.description:
This problem has not been resolved as per your response. The waste is very much still there. Numerous mattresses have been dumped and need clearing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Marshalsea Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nettles growing through benches, 25th April
item.description:
The two benches by the tennis courts at Firs Farm Wetlands have nettles growing through them and so are unusable.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Firs Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Bench or seat on the pavement

item.title: Broken litter bin, 25th April
item.description:
Bin has been lifted off its base and is broken. Outside gym in Chatterton Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chatterton Road, Southborough, Greater London

item.description:

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbey Crescent, Lower Belvedere, Greater London

item.title: Green bin overflowing again, 25th April
item.description:
Photo taken today 25 April - please clean up and sort out a permanent solution!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Grove Lane, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: House constantly has rubbish outside, 25th April
item.description:
House has rubbis outside there door constantly bags get ripped into and it casues rubbish all on the road.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NOT FIXED Cycle lane road markings faded, worn and eroded sections. Previous reports said fixed but not fixed., 25th April
item.description:
NOT FIXED Cycle lane road markings faded, worn and eroded sections. Previous reports said fixed but not fixed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
